example.target: E un uomo robusto e lavora nei campi.
example.gloss: He is a sturdy man and works in the fields.

example.target: Nuota ogni giorno e per questo resta snella.
example.gloss: She swims every day and that is why she stays slender.

example.target: Mio zio e calvo da quando aveva trent anni.
example.gloss: My uncle has been bald since he was thirty.

example.target: Ha i capelli ricci e neri.
example.gloss: She has curly black hair.

example.target: Preferisco i capelli lisci.
example.gloss: I prefer straight hair.

words.note: farsi la barba means to shave

example.target: Si e fatto crescere la barba durante le vacanze.
example.gloss: He grew a beard during the holidays.

example.target: Le prime rughe non mi preoccupano.
example.gloss: The first wrinkles do not worry me.

example.target: Non giudicare una persona solo dall aspetto.
example.gloss: Do not judge a person only by their appearance.

example.target: Ha la carnagione chiara e si scotta subito al sole.
example.gloss: She has a fair complexion and burns quickly in the sun.

example.target: Qual e la tua altezza esatta?
example.gloss: What is your exact height?

example.target: Ho perso peso senza fare una dieta severa.
example.gloss: I lost weight without following a strict diet.

example.target: E generoso con gli amici e con gli sconosciuti.
example.gloss: He is generous with friends and with strangers.

words.note: pl. m. egoisti, pl. f. egoiste

example.target: Non voglio sembrare egoista, ma stasera resto a casa.
example.gloss: I do not want to seem selfish, but tonight I am staying home.

example.target: I miei genitori sono orgogliosi di me.
example.gloss: My parents are proud of me.

example.target: Sei troppo testardo per ammettere l errore.
example.gloss: You are too stubborn to admit the mistake.

example.target: Ti do un consiglio sincero.
example.gloss: I am giving you sincere advice.

example.target: La domenica divento pigro e non esco.
example.gloss: On Sunday I become lazy and do not go out.

example.target: Sono curioso di sapere come e finita.
example.gloss: I am curious to know how it ended.

example.target: Con i bambini bisogna essere pazienti.
example.gloss: With children you have to be patient.

example.target: Cerchiamo una persona affidabile per questo incarico.
example.gloss: We are looking for a reliable person for this task.

example.target: Il direttore e sempre disponibile ad ascoltare.
example.gloss: The director is always willing to listen.

example.target: Ha un progetto ambizioso per il quartiere.
example.gloss: He has an ambitious plan for the neighbourhood.

example.target: Nonostante il successo, e rimasto modesto.
example.gloss: Despite his success, he has remained modest.

example.target: Non essere permaloso, era solo uno scherzo.
example.gloss: Do not be touchy, it was only a joke.

example.target: In autunno divento un po malinconico.
example.gloss: In autumn I become a bit melancholy.

example.target: Resta calmo e spiega la situazione.
example.gloss: Stay calm and explain the situation.

example.target: La professoressa e severa ma giusta.
example.gloss: The teacher is strict but fair.

example.target: I suoi figli sono molto educati.
example.gloss: His children are very well mannered.

example.target: E stato maleducato con la cassiera.
example.gloss: He was rude to the cashier.

example.target: Ha fatto un prezzo onesto.
example.gloss: He gave an honest price.

example.target: Credeva di essere furbo, ma lo hanno scoperto.
example.gloss: He thought he was clever, but they found him out.

example.target: E stata una discussione sciocca.
example.gloss: It was a silly argument.

words.note: pl. saggi; also n. m. essay

example.target: Mia nonna e una donna saggia.
example.gloss: My grandmother is a wise woman.

example.target: La classe e vivace ma attenta.
example.gloss: The class is lively but attentive.

example.target: Il risultato finale e stato eccellente.
example.gloss: The final result was excellent.

example.target: Il servizio era mediocre per quel prezzo.
example.gloss: The service was mediocre for that price.

example.target: Ho passato una giornata terribile.
example.gloss: I had a terrible day.

example.target: Il suo italiano e gia discreto.
example.gloss: His Italian is already fairly good.

example.target: Ci sono stati miglioramenti notevoli.
example.gloss: There have been considerable improvements.

example.target: Il film era bello ma il finale deludente.
example.gloss: The film was good but the ending disappointing.

example.target: La sua reazione e stata sorprendente.
example.gloss: His reaction was surprising.

example.target: Il trasloco e stato piu faticoso del previsto.
example.gloss: The move was more tiring than expected.

words.note: fare comodo means to come in handy

example.target: Questa poltrona e molto comoda.
example.gloss: This armchair is very comfortable.

example.target: L orario del treno e scomodo per me.
example.gloss: The train time is inconvenient for me.

example.target: Abbiamo trovato un albergo economico in centro.
example.gloss: We found a cheap hotel in the centre.

example.target: La riparazione e stata piu costosa dell acquisto.
example.gloss: The repair was more expensive than the purchase.

example.target: Questo corso mi e stato molto utile.
example.gloss: This course was very useful to me.

example.target: E inutile insistere, non cambiera idea.
example.gloss: It is pointless to insist, he will not change his mind.

example.target: Sei sicuro di aver chiuso la porta?
example.gloss: Are you sure you locked the door?

example.target: Quella curva e pericolosa con la pioggia.
example.gloss: That bend is dangerous in the rain.

example.target: La cucina e finalmente pulita.
example.gloss: The kitchen is finally clean.

example.target: Le scarpe sono sporche di fango.
example.gloss: The shoes are dirty with mud.

example.target: Il locale era troppo rumoroso per parlare.
example.gloss: The place was too noisy to talk.

example.target: Cerco un appartamento luminoso.
example.gloss: I am looking for a bright flat.

words.note: also n. m. il buio darkness

example.target: La stanza e buia anche di giorno.
example.gloss: The room is dark even during the day.

example.target: Questi pantaloni mi stanno stretti.
example.gloss: These trousers are tight on me.

example.target: La strada e larga e ben illuminata.
example.gloss: The road is wide and well lit.

example.target: Il lago e profondo trenta metri.
example.gloss: The lake is thirty metres deep.

example.target: Ho preparato una cena leggera.
example.gloss: I made a light dinner.

example.target: La valigia e troppo pesante da portare.
example.gloss: The suitcase is too heavy to carry.

example.target: Il cuscino e morbido e comodo.
example.gloss: The pillow is soft and comfortable.

example.target: Il pane di ieri e diventato duro.
example.gloss: Yesterday bread has gone hard.

example.target: Questo asciugamano e ruvido.
example.gloss: This towel is rough.

example.target: Attento, il pavimento e bagnato.
example.gloss: Careful, the floor is wet.

example.target: I panni sono gia asciutti.
example.gloss: The clothes are already dry.

example.target: Le pere non sono ancora mature.
example.gloss: The pears are not ripe yet.

example.target: Il sugo e saporito senza essere salato.
example.gloss: The sauce is tasty without being salty.

example.target: La minestra e insipida, manca il sale.
example.gloss: The soup is bland, it needs salt.

example.target: Non mangio cibi troppo piccanti.
example.gloss: I do not eat very spicy food.

example.target: Il latte e diventato acido.
example.gloss: The milk has gone sour.

words.note: also n. m. i surgelati frozen foods

example.target: Uso il pesce surgelato quando ho poco tempo.
example.gloss: I use frozen fish when I am short of time.

example.target: Mi piace la pizza con il bordo croccante.
example.gloss: I like pizza with a crunchy crust.

example.target: La porzione era abbondante per due persone.
example.gloss: The portion was generous enough for two people.

example.target: Quest anno il raccolto e scarso.
example.gloss: This year the harvest is poor.

example.target: E un caso raro ma possibile.
example.gloss: It is a rare but possible case.

words.note: also n. m. il comune the town council

example.target: Abbiamo molti interessi in comune.
example.gloss: We have many interests in common.

example.target: E strano che non abbia ancora risposto.
example.gloss: It is strange that he has not replied yet.

example.target: Ci vediamo nel posto abituale.
example.gloss: We will meet in the usual place.

example.target: La situazione attuale e complicata.
example.gloss: The current situation is complicated.

example.target: Ho letto uno studio recente sul tema.
example.gloss: I read a recent study on the subject.

example.target: Il centro antico e chiuso alle auto.
example.gloss: The old centre is closed to cars.

example.target: Preferisco l arredamento moderno.
example.gloss: I prefer modern furniture.

example.target: E un piatto tipico della regione.
example.gloss: It is a typical dish of the region.

example.target: Ha avuto un idea originale.
example.gloss: He had an original idea.

example.target: Il documento risulta falso.
example.gloss: The document turns out to be fake.

example.target: La firma e autentica.
example.gloss: The signature is genuine.

words.note: also n. m. il vuoto the void

example.target: Il frigorifero e completamente vuoto.
example.gloss: The fridge is completely empty.

example.target: La sala era piena di gente.
example.gloss: The hall was full of people.

example.target: L albergo e completo per il fine settimana.
example.gloss: The hotel is fully booked for the weekend.

example.target: Hanno dato un rimborso parziale.
example.gloss: They gave a partial refund.

example.target: L ingresso al museo e gratuito la domenica.
example.gloss: Entry to the museum is free on Sundays.

example.target: Comprare il biglietto online e piu conveniente.
example.gloss: Buying the ticket online is better value.

example.target: Il modello che cercavo e esaurito.
example.gloss: The model I was looking for is out of stock.

example.target: Questo film non e adatto ai bambini.
example.gloss: This film is not suitable for children.

example.target: Ha fatto una domanda inopportuna.
example.gloss: He asked an inappropriate question.

example.target: Non e necessario prenotare.
example.gloss: It is not necessary to book.

words.note: il prima possibile as soon as possible

example.target: Rispondimi il prima possibile.
example.gloss: Answer me as soon as possible.

example.target: Con questo traffico e impossibile arrivare in orario.
example.gloss: With this traffic it is impossible to arrive on time.

example.target: E probabile che piova domani.
example.gloss: It is likely that it will rain tomorrow.

example.target: Era evidente che non voleva parlare.
example.gloss: It was obvious that he did not want to talk.

example.target: Oggi fa piuttosto freddo.
example.gloss: It is rather cold today.

example.target: Ti ringrazio davvero di cuore.
example.gloss: I thank you really sincerely.

example.target: Abbiamo quasi finito il lavoro.
example.gloss: We have almost finished the work.

example.target: Mi piace il mare, soprattutto d inverno.
example.gloss: I like the sea, especially in winter.

example.target: Comunque ti ringrazio per l aiuto.
example.gloss: Anyway, thank you for the help.

example.target: Ha invitato perfino i vicini.
example.gloss: He invited even the neighbours.

example.target: Ormai e troppo tardi per cambiare idea.
example.gloss: By now it is too late to change your mind.

words.note: not finally in a list, which is infine

example.target: Finalmente sei arrivato!
example.gloss: At last you have arrived!

example.target: All improvviso si e messo a piovere.
example.gloss: Suddenly it started to rain.

example.target: Parla piu lentamente, per favore.
example.gloss: Speak more slowly, please.

example.target: Ha risposto velocemente al messaggio.
example.gloss: He replied quickly to the message.

example.target: Leggi attentamente le istruzioni.
example.gloss: Read the instructions carefully.

example.target: Ogni tanto ci sentiamo al telefono.
example.gloss: Now and then we talk on the phone.

example.target: Talvolta e meglio tacere.
example.gloss: Sometimes it is better to keep quiet.

example.target: E uscito poco fa.
example.gloss: He went out a little while ago.

example.target: Ho aspettato parecchio prima di entrare.
example.gloss: I waited quite a while before going in.

example.target: La questione e assai complessa.
example.gloss: The matter is very complex.

example.target: Buone feste! Grazie, altrettanto.
example.gloss: Happy holidays! Thanks, likewise.

example.target: Ha addirittura pagato per tutti.
example.gloss: He even paid for everyone.

words.note: comparative of buono; il migliore the best

example.target: Questa e la soluzione migliore.
example.gloss: This is the best solution.

example.target: E stata la peggiore esperienza dell anno.
example.gloss: It was the worst experience of the year.

example.target: Il mio zaino e uguale al tuo.
example.gloss: My backpack is the same as yours.

example.target: Ho avuto un problema simile al tuo.
example.gloss: I had a problem similar to yours.

words.note: diverso da; before a noun it can mean several

example.target: Il risultato e diverso da quello atteso.
example.gloss: The result is different from the expected one.

example.target: Le due copie sono identiche.
example.gloss: The two copies are identical.

example.target: Il paragone con l anno scorso non regge.
example.gloss: The comparison with last year does not hold.

example.target: C e una forte somiglianza tra padre e figlio.
example.gloss: There is a strong resemblance between father and son.

example.target: Il vantaggio principale e il prezzo.
example.gloss: The main advantage is the price.

example.target: Lo svantaggio e la distanza dal centro.
example.gloss: The disadvantage is the distance from the centre.

example.target: Ha il pregio di dire sempre la verita.
example.gloss: He has the merit of always telling the truth.

example.target: Ogni persona ha i suoi difetti.
example.gloss: Every person has their flaws.

example.target: Preferisco la qualita alla quantita.
example.gloss: I prefer quality over quantity.

words.note: di buon gusto in good taste

example.target: Ha buon gusto nel vestire.
example.gloss: He has good taste in clothes.

example.target: Mi piace il suo stile diretto.
example.gloss: I like his direct style.

example.target: Non ho la mia misura in questo negozio.
example.gloss: They do not have my size in this shop.

words.note: essere in forma to be fit

example.target: La torta ha una forma rotonda.
example.gloss: The cake has a round shape.

example.target: Ho l impressione che qualcosa non vada.
example.gloss: I have the impression that something is wrong.

example.target: Ha un carattere difficile ma leale.
example.gloss: He has a difficult but loyal character.

example.target: Stamattina e di cattivo umore.
example.gloss: This morning he is in a bad mood.

example.target: Raccontami tutti i dettagli.
example.gloss: Tell me all the details.

example.target: Ho la sensazione di averlo gia visto.
example.gloss: I have the feeling I have seen him before.

example.target: Questo anello ha un grande valore affettivo.
example.gloss: This ring has great sentimental value.

example.target: Il livello del corso e intermedio.
example.gloss: The level of the course is intermediate.

example.target: Mi sembra una buona idea.
example.gloss: It seems like a good idea to me.

example.target: Assomigli molto a tua madre.
example.gloss: You look a lot like your mother.

example.target: Non giudicare senza conoscere i fatti.
example.gloss: Do not judge without knowing the facts.

example.target: Apprezzo molto il tuo aiuto.
example.gloss: I really appreciate your help.

example.target: La situazione e peggiorata in poche ore.
example.gloss: The situation got worse in a few hours.

example.target: Non paragonare i tuoi figli tra loro.
example.gloss: Do not compare your children with each other.

example.target: Dopo tanto lavoro meriti una vacanza.
example.gloss: After so much work you deserve a holiday.
